title: Session Management Flow
interaction_flow: Agent → ProxyServer: POST /session/create { title, description, invite_node_ids, max_participants }
Router → SessionHandler: createSession({ title, description, inviteNodeIds, maxParticipants })
SessionHandler → Store: send({ type:'session_join', payload:{session_id, joined_at}, priority:'normal' })
Agent → ProxyServer: POST /session/message { session_id, to_node_id, msg_type, payload }
Router → SessionHandler: sendMessage({ sessionId, toNodeId, msgType, payload })
SessionHandler: validates payload size <= 16KB; defaults msg_type to 'context_update'
Agent → ProxyServer: POST /session/delegate { session_id, to_node_id, title, description, role }
Router → SessionHandler: delegateSubtask({ sessionId, toNodeId, title, description, role })
SessionHandler: validates role in ['builder','planner','reviewer'], defaults to 'builder'
Agent → ProxyServer: POST /session/submit { session_id, task_id, result_asset_id, summary }
Router → SessionHandler: submitResult({ sessionId, taskId, resultAssetId, summary })
SessionHandler → Store: send({ type:'session_leave', payload:{session_id,left_at}, priority:'normal' })
SessionHandler → Store: list({ type:'session_create', direction:'outbound', limit:50 })
key_relationships: ProxyServer instantiates SessionHandler(store, logger) on startup
ProxyServer passes sessionHandler to buildRoutes() as extension
Router (buildRoutes) depends_on SessionHandler for all /session/* routes
SessionHandler depends_on Store (composition via constructor injection)
SessionHandler falls back to direct store.send() in routes if sessionHandler is null

method_signatures.SessionHandler.delegateSubtask: ({ sessionId*, toNodeId, title*, description, role }) → store.send()

message_types.session_delegate: priority:high — assign subtask to a peer node with role

validation_rules: createSession: title required; inviteNodeIds capped at 10; maxParticipants clamped [2,20], default 5
sendMessage: payload must be object; serialized JSON <= 16KB
delegateSubtask: role restricted to ['builder','planner','reviewer']; defaults to 'builder'
important_notes: SessionHandler is an extension of the Evolver proxy, enabling agent-initiated swarm collaboration (peer-to-peer). All operations are async (routes are async functions). The store acts as a local mailbox persisted at ~/.evomap/mailbox. Routes fall back to direct store calls if sessionHandler extension is not loaded.
